headline: JPMorgan Raises its Price Target on Garmin (GRMN) to $285
summary: Garmin Ltd. (NYSE:GRMN) is one of the 10 Best Debt Free Blue Chip Stocks to Invest In. On April 15, 2026, JPMorgan raised its price target on Garmin Ltd. (NYSE:GRMN) to $285 from $265 previously and maintained a Neutral rating on the shares as part of a broader Q1 preview across the hardware and networking […]
